name: More Smørrebrød
recipeInstructions:
1. SHRIMP SANDWICH: (Rejemad)
a. Place a fresh leaf of lettuce on buttered bread.
b. Top abundantly with cold boiled shrimps.
2. SMOKED SALMON AND SCRAMBLED EGG: (Roget Laks og Roraeg)
a. Put a piece of fresh smoked salmon on buttered bread.
b. Place diagonally across the bread, a strip of cold scrambled egg.
3. LOBSTER SALAD: (Hummersalat)
a. Mix small pieces of cold but freshly cooked lobster and asparagus in mayonnaise seasoned with tarragon vinegar.
b. Put a lettuce leaf on each piece of buttered bread and spread with the mixture.
c. Garnish with an extra piece of lobster and one or two asparagus tips.
4. SMOKED EEL AND SCRAMBLED EGG: (Roget aal og Roraeg)
a. Cut smoked eel into 2-inch pieces, removing skin and bones.
b. Put enough pieces on buttered bread to cover it completely.
c. Top with slices of cold scrambled egg and sprinkle with chives.
5. FRIED ROE: (Ristet Torskerogn)
a. Place boiled cod roe under pressure until cold, then cut into 1/2-inch slices with a sharp knife.
b. Fry the slices in plenty of butter.
c. Place on buttered bread and add a lemon slice.
d. Cut the lemon slice halfway and twist so it stands upright.
6. FRIED FISH FILLETS: (Stegt Fiskefilet)
a. Serve buttered bread on a separate plate.
b. Serve with Tartar sauce.
7. HERRING SALAD: (Sildesalat)
a. Combine cooked meat, potatoes, red beets, onion, and well-soaked herring in a mushy mass.
b. If too dry, add vinegar from the red beets and sugar to flavor.
c. Make a sauce with 2 tablespoons butter and 4 cups flour cooked together and diluted with water or stock.
d. Flavor the sauce with vinegar, mustard, and coloring (if necessary) until a beautiful red shade is achieved.
e. Spread bread with herring salad and decorate with slices of hard-boiled egg or a fried egg.
1. Prepare all ingredients as listed above.
2. Assemble each smørrebrød according to the specific instructions provided for each dish.
